title: leymus innovatus
intro: Leymus innovatus, also known as Blue Lyme Grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Leymus innovatus has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant's herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including colds, bronchitis, and skin irritations.
